title: Terratonic
body:
# Terratonic

**Terratonic** is a modified version of Tectonic with Terralith compatibility. It contains all features of Tectonic with some terrain shaping changes to accomodate Terralith's biomes and other files needed to ensure a fairly smooth gameplay experience.

Please look to the [Tectonic Wiki](https://github.com/Apollounknowndev/tectonic/wiki/Terratonic-FAQ#how-do-i-install-terratonic) for installation instructions.

**If you are using the mod version of Terralith, __you do not need this__! Use the Tectonic mod, as it has Terratonic built in.**
